entries.sentence: The disc jockey played music at the party.
entries.chinese: disc jockey = 唱片骑师；唱片骑师在聚会上播放音乐。

entries.sentence: The hotel has a small disco downstairs.
entries.chinese: disco = 迪斯科舞厅；酒店楼下有一个小迪斯科舞厅。

entries.sentence: The discovery of the old map excited the class.
entries.chinese: discovery = 发现；旧地图的发现让全班很兴奋。

entries.sentence: We had a discussion about the school trip.
entries.chinese: discussion = 讨论；我们讨论了学校旅行。

entries.sentence: This disease spreads quickly in winter.
entries.chinese: disease = 疾病；这种疾病在冬天传播很快。

entries.sentence: Put the plates in the dishwasher.
entries.chinese: dishwasher = 洗碗机；把盘子放进洗碗机。

entries.sentence: Save the photos on this disk.
entries.chinese: disk = 磁盘；把照片保存在这张磁盘上。

entries.sentence: This district has many small shops.
entries.chinese: district = 区；这个区有许多小商店。

entries.sentence: The diver found a shell under the water.
entries.chinese: diver = 潜水员；潜水员在水下发现了一个贝壳。

entries.sentence: Diving is popular on this island.
entries.chinese: diving = 潜水；潜水在这座岛上很受欢迎。

entries.sentence: The child put the doll on the bed.
entries.chinese: doll = 玩偶；孩子把玩偶放在床上。

entries.sentence: A dolphin swam beside the boat.
entries.chinese: dolphin = 海豚；一只海豚在船旁游动。

entries.sentence: The donkey carried bags up the hill.
entries.chinese: donkey = 驴；驴把袋子驮上山。

entries.sentence: Put a dot above the letter i.
entries.chinese: dot = 点；在字母 i 上方加一个点。

entries.sentence: I had no doubt that she was right.
entries.chinese: doubt = 怀疑；我毫不怀疑她是对的。

entries.sentence: The keys are in the top drawer.
entries.chinese: drawer = 抽屉；钥匙在最上面的抽屉里。

entries.sentence: His dream is to become a pilot.
entries.chinese: dream = 梦想；他的梦想是成为一名飞行员。

entries.sentence: The drive to the lake took two hours.
entries.chinese: drive = 车程；去湖边的车程花了两个小时。

entries.sentence: The driver stopped at the red light.
entries.chinese: driver = 司机；司机在红灯前停下。

entries.sentence: You need a license to drive a car.
entries.chinese: license = 执照；开车需要执照。

entries.sentence: The drugstore sells medicine and shampoo.
entries.chinese: drugstore = 药店；药店出售药品和洗发水。

entries.sentence: He played the drum in the school band.
entries.chinese: drum = 鼓；他在学校乐队里打鼓。

entries.sentence: Throw the empty bottle in the dustbin.
entries.chinese: dustbin = 垃圾桶；把空瓶扔进垃圾桶。

entries.sentence: It is my duty to lock the classroom.
entries.chinese: duty = 责任；锁教室是我的责任。

entries.sentence: The duvet kept me warm all night.
entries.chinese: duvet = 羽绒被；羽绒被让我整晚都很暖和。

entries.sentence: She stayed home because of an earache.
entries.chinese: earache = 耳痛；她因为耳痛待在家里。

entries.sentence: She lost one silver earring.
entries.chinese: earring = 耳环；她丢了一只银耳环。

entries.sentence: Economics helps us understand money and trade.
entries.chinese: economics = 经济学；经济学帮助我们理解金钱和贸易。

entries.sentence: Do not stand too close to the edge.
entries.chinese: edge = 边缘；不要站得离边缘太近。

entries.sentence: The medicine had a strong effect.
entries.chinese: effect = 效果；这种药效果很强。

entries.sentence: Your effort made the project better.
entries.chinese: effort = 努力；你的努力让这个项目更好了。

entries.sentence: He hurt his elbow during basketball practice.
entries.chinese: elbow = 肘部；他在篮球训练中伤了肘部。

entries.sentence: Take the elevator to the fifth floor.
entries.chinese: elevator = 电梯；乘电梯到五楼。

entries.sentence: The embassy is closed on Sunday.
entries.chinese: embassy = 大使馆；大使馆星期日关闭。

entries.sentence: Every employee must wear an ID card.
entries.chinese: employee = 雇员；每位雇员都必须佩戴身份证件。

entries.sentence: Her employer offered a training course.
entries.chinese: employer = 雇主；她的雇主提供了一门培训课程。

entries.sentence: The ending of the story surprised me.
entries.chinese: ending = 结尾；这个故事的结尾让我很惊讶。

entries.sentence: In the game, the enemy hides behind the wall.
entries.chinese: enemy = 敌人；在游戏中，敌人躲在墙后。

entries.sentence: Solar energy can heat water.
entries.chinese: energy = 能源；太阳能可以加热水。

entries.sentence: The car engine sounded strange.
entries.chinese: engine = 发动机；汽车发动机听起来很奇怪。

entries.sentence: Engineering is a popular university subject.
entries.chinese: engineering = 工程学；工程学是一门受欢迎的大学科目。

entries.sentence: The museum entry is free for children.
entries.chinese: entry = 入场；儿童可以免费入场博物馆。

entries.sentence: Put the letter in an envelope.
entries.chinese: envelope = 信封；把信放进信封里。

entries.sentence: The next episode starts at eight.
entries.chinese: episode = 一集；下一集八点开始。

entries.sentence: Use an eraser to remove the pencil mark.
entries.chinese: eraser = 橡皮；用橡皮擦掉铅笔痕迹。

entries.sentence: The sports event begins at nine.
entries.chinese: event = 活动；体育活动九点开始。

entries.sentence: The student exchange lasted two weeks.
entries.chinese: exchange = 交换；这次学生交换持续了两周。

entries.sentence: Check the exchange rate before you travel.
entries.chinese: exchange rate = 汇率；旅行前查看汇率。

entries.sentence: He gave a weak excuse for being late.
entries.chinese: excuse = 借口；他为迟到找了一个站不住脚的借口。

entries.sentence: An expert checked the old painting.
entries.chinese: expert = 专家；一位专家检查了那幅旧画。
